title: Genshin UI
description: A minecraft mod brings Genshin Impact's UI experience to minecraft
body:
A minecraft mod brings Genshin Impact's UI experience to minecraft Warning: this mod is in early technical testing and does not represent final quality
Modified elements:
World loading screen (testing)
Dark mode (testing)
Intro animation (planned) This mod may have conflicts with other mods. If this mod causes a crash, please report to github. 1.19.x support will done after first release version.
